splash.title: Little World
splash.subtitle: Calm stories, one page at a time

ageGate.heading: Who is using this device?
ageGate.desc: We ask once to keep things safe. Your answer is saved on the device only.
ageGate.adultSub: A parent or guardian setting up

privacy.heading: What we promise
privacy.desc: Built for kids. Reviewed against COPPA. Nothing leaves the device unless a grown-up signs in.

policy.noTrackingBody: We do not collect, sell, or share personal information. Your child's usage stays on this device.
policy.noAdsBody: Little World is fully ad-free and will never show third-party advertising.
policy.parentalBody: Subscriptions require a verified grown-up email. Parents can cancel any time from their app store.
policy.contactBody: Questions? Reach the team at hello@littleworld.app — we reply within two working days.

terms.agreementBody: Little World is made for children but managed by a parent or guardian. By using the app, a grown-up accepts these terms on the child's behalf.
terms.licenseBody: We give you a personal, non-commercial licence to enjoy Little World and its stories with your family. Please don't copy, resell, or redistribute the stories, images, or audio.
terms.subscriptionBody: Premium stories are offered through an auto-renewing subscription billed by the App Store or Google Play. It renews until cancelled. You can manage or cancel any time in your store account — deleting the app alone does not cancel it.
terms.contentBody: All stories, illustrations, and narration in Little World belong to us or our licensors and are protected by copyright. They are provided for your child's personal enjoyment only.
terms.safeBody: There are no ads and no third-party tracking. Grown-up actions — subscribing, contacting us, opening external links — sit behind a parental gate. Parents are responsible for supervising their child's use.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms as the app grows. We'll refresh the date above when we do, and continued use means the changes are accepted.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these terms? Reach us at hello@littleworld.app — we reply within two working days.

consent.heading: Before you begin
consent.desc: Please confirm the following to continue.
consent.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to continue
consent.agreeDocs: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions
consent.confirmGuardian: I confirm that I am a parent, guardian, or professional supporting a child with autism or developmental needs
consent.recommendationBody: Little World is designed as a supportive tool. We recommend discussing its use with your child's psychologist, therapist, or relevant professional before starting.

mood.prompt: How are you feeling right now?
mood.subtitle: Tap the face that fits you today.

storyList.heading: Stories for you
storyList.emptyText: No stories yet. Check back soon!

paywall.heroSub: 20+ stories · audio narration · new each week
paywall.benefitStoriesDesc: 20+ premium stories with new ones every week
paywall.benefitAudioDesc: Calm, slow voice for every page
paywall.benefitThemesDesc: More gentle color sets to choose from
paywall.pricingNote: First week free · cancel any time

parentGate.heading: A grown-up needs to confirm
parentGate.desc: We'll email a link to verify. The subscription only starts once they tap it.
parentGate.label: Parent email
parentGate.hint: We never share or sell email addresses.

grownupGate.subtitle: This area is for parents.
grownupGate.heading: Tap the answer
grownupGate.footerNote: We ask a small question so children don't open the parent area by mistake.

parentDashboard.subHello: Here's how this week is going.
parentDashboard.lockedDesc: Insights help you see how reading time is going. Available with Premium.
parentDashboard.moodEmpty: No check-ins yet — feelings will appear here after your child opens a story.
parentDashboard.noReadingYet: No reading yet — stats will appear after the first story.
parentDashboard.subActiveMsg: Premium · ${{price}}/month, billed through your app store. You can cancel any time — access lasts until the end of the paid period.
parentDashboard.subFreeMsg: You're on the free plan. Premium unlocks all stories and audio narration.
parentDashboard.confirmCancelMsg: You'll keep Premium until the end of the period you've already paid for. After that, premium stories lock again and you won't be charged any further.
parentDashboard.restoreMsg: Purchases can be restored here once subscriptions launch in the app stores.
parentDashboard.supportMsg: Write to us at {{email}} — we reply within two working days.
parentDashboard.privacyNote: All reading data stays on this device. We never share it.

auth.heading: Welcome, grown-up
auth.subheading: Sign in to manage your child's reading experience and unlock premium stories.
auth.footerNote: We only use your email to manage your subscription. No spam, ever.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
auth.forgotSentDesc: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a reset link. It may take a minute to arrive.
